home_hero.subtitle: World-class infrastructure, buildings, energy, and industrial projects across the Middle East and Africa — delivered since 2000.

home_statement.heading: Since 2000, INFRA Construction has delivered 75+ projects across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond — from highways and dams to power plants and industrial facilities.

home_sector_buildings.title: Buildings
home_sector_buildings.short: Residential, commercial, and institutional construction from concept to handover.

home_sector_infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
home_sector_infrastructure.short: Civil works, water systems, energy, and industrial projects across the Middle East and Africa.

home_subsector_civil.title: Civil Works
home_subsector_civil.short: Roads, bridges, airports, ports, and large-scale civil engineering.

home_subsector_water.title: Water & Utilities
home_subsector_water.short: Water supply, wastewater treatment, dams, and utility systems.

home_subsector_energy.title: Energy & Power
home_subsector_energy.short: Power generation, transmission networks, and substations.

home_subsector_industrial.title: Industrial & Oil
home_subsector_industrial.short: Pipeline engineering, plant construction, and industrial O&M.

home_philosophy.description: All projects are managed to achieve the best goals of scope, time, cost, and quality — delivering exceptional results to every client, on every engagement.

home_whoweare.paragraph1: Infra Construction is a contracting company that has carried out numerous and various projects since its establishment in 2000. Every task is executed through hard work, dedication, and optimal management of resources.
home_whoweare.paragraph2: We provide professional services in contracting — especially in the infrastructure field — executing according to international codes and project specifications, with offices across the UAE, Egypt, Yemen, Jordan, and Canada.

home_news_1.title: INFRA Completes Major Water Infrastructure Project in Djibouti

home_news_2.title: INFRA Renews ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 Certifications for 2025

home_news_3.title: INFRA Delivers Dhobab Airport Strategic Infrastructure, Yemen

home_global.heading: Global Reach
home_global.description: Five regional offices across multiple regions, with 75+ completed projects across the Middle East, Africa, and beyond.

home_cta.description: Partner with INFRA Construction for reliable solutions that deliver engineering precision, operational efficiency, and long-term performance.

about_hero.title: A construction company built on engineering discipline
about_hero.subtitle: Decades of delivering infrastructure, buildings, water and energy projects across the Middle East and Africa.

about_story.title: Our story
about_story.paragraph1: INFRA was founded as a specialist contractor with a single goal: deliver complex infrastructure work to international standards in markets where it matters most.
about_story.paragraph2: Today the group operates across multiple countries, with a portfolio spanning dams, highways, ports, airports, power plants, water treatment, social housing and industrial facilities.

about_philosophy.title: Operating philosophy
about_philosophy.description: Engineering integrity, safety, and on-time delivery are non-negotiable. We invest in people, plant, and partnerships that compound over years.
